_comment: Email-to-job routing rules used by scripts/daily-orchestrator.js. The classifier scores each rule against (sender domain, sender address, subject, bodyPreview) and assigns the highest-scoring job. If no rule scores above 0, the email is unclassified.

rules._comment: Eneabba — client is Macrete, end-utility is Western Power, structural drawings come from Tekance. Macrete domain alone is not a safe signal (Macrete bills multiple jobs incl. completed Regans Ford), so the keywords carry the weight.

Kings Head Substation — client is Power On Cabling (NOT Macrete). SharePoint folder: 'Kings Head Substation - Power On Cabling'. Western Power is the end utility but is also referenced on Eneabba, so it's not a safe keyword.
